items.title: Morgan Stanley Lowers PT on International Business Machines Corporation (IBM) Stock
items.description: International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE:IBM) is one of the Best Automation Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. On February 25, Morgan Stanley analyst Erik Woodring reduced the firm’s price objective on the company’s stock to $247 from $304, while keeping an “Equal Weight” rating, as reported by The Fly. The firm highlighted AI disruption risk entering […]

items.title: SEI Engages IBM to Accelerate Enterprise Transformation Through Agentic AI
items.description: SEI®(NASDAQ: SEIC) today announced it has joined forces with IBM to accelerate enterprise transformation through agentic AI and automation and modernize how it operates, innovates, and delivers value to clients—reinforcing the company's commitment to sustainable growth.

items.title: International Business Machines Corporation (IBM) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
items.description: IBM (IBM) has been one of the stocks most watched by Zacks.com users lately. So, it is worth exploring what lies ahead for the stock.
